{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015592049182A68C22910090DB2"}"},"total":1223},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7114282629688050468","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个小说写的还是不错的，希望给主角一个储物戒子，但不要写成修仙小说，还有就是写的越长越好，建议尽快给主角升官的，还有就是让主角参与一些江湖门派的争端什么的。不要只是把那些圣骑士干掉就结束小说了哦"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656423072,"group_id":"7073799674888457230","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwX5UOpFbPhW03jwYBsbpGY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3784f7aaa36046958cfcd0f85aeefdb5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531551&x-signature=mk4PCQ%2B5XyWZpj0foQEj8yTK4RQ%3D","user_id":"52197009203","user_name":"中国东北🐺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52197009203","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1673961640,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7073799674888457230","book_info":{"abstract":"林啸意外穿越特种兵的世界，随身带着最强国术系统。

暗器精通：拥有此技能，你可以熟知每一件事物的属性，能将任何一种物品当作杀人的利器，杀人是一种技术，不滞于物，请谨慎使用此技能。
何晨光：“你从娘胎就可以练功吗？”
雷战：“牙签也能杀人，老子服了！”
安然：“啸哥，你确定你的女友是大明星？不是特种兵？”
